note: Saraya Awliya al Dam claimed five 'operations' targeting US bases in and outside Iraq on March 14, including an attack against US forces in Erbil. The Erbil attack is a distinct location from the Victory Base drone attacks (ID 400) and may warrant a separate event, but the claim comes from a likely Iranian front group with no independent corroboration and no casualty data. Insufficient detail to confidently assign severity or confirm it as a new versus previously-logged event.

raw.actor: Saraya Awliya al Dam (likely Iranian militia front group)
raw.location: Erbil, Iraq (and unspecified other US bases outside Iraq)
